description: Two overlapping blades with pointed tips and curved handles, symbolizing a tool used for cutting various materials, embodying the concept of scissors.
Two blades connected at a pivot point, used for cutting various materials, situated in the center, symbolizing the concept of scissors.
Two overlapping blades with pointed tips, forming an "X" shape, symbolizing the concept of scissors used for cutting various materials.
Two blades intersecting at a pivot point, used for cutting various materials, symbolizing the concept of scissors.
A pair of scissors with open blades, used for cutting hair, symbolizing a haircut or hairstyling service.
